svg.title: Bazel high-level architecture
svg.desc: Top-down flowchart: BUILD files and source files feed into Loading, Analysis, then Execution phases inside a Skyframe boundary. Local and remote caches flank Execution. Outputs at the bottom. External deps loop back to Loading.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes inside a Bazel BUILD file?')
sendPrompt('How does Bazel read source files?')
sendPrompt('What happens during the Bazel loading phase?')
g.text: Parses BUILD files, evaluates Starlark, builds target graph

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Bazel analysis phase produce?')
g.text: Runs rule logic, produces action graph

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Bazel execute build actions?')
sendPrompt('How does the Bazel local action cache work?')
sendPrompt('What is Bazel remote caching and remote execution?')
sendPrompt('What kinds of outputs does Bazel produce?')
sendPrompt('What are Bazel repository rules and external dependencies?')
